\begin{aligned} & \left\{\begin{aligned} z+b & =\frac{3}{25} \text { ( hour per widget) } \\ z-b & =\frac{2}{20} \\ 2 z & =\frac{3}{25}+\frac{3}{20} \\ & =\frac{12+15}{100}=\frac{27}{100} \\ z & =\frac{27}{200} \\ \frac{27}{200} \times 40 & =\frac{27}{5} \text { hours } \end{aligned}\right. \end{aligned}

error.teacher_advice_ch: 方程式假設錯誤，依照同學的假設，z和b為該機器生成一個零件所需的時間，由於機器一起工作，3小時內可以製作25個小部件，但同學假設的方程式z+b=3/25，涵義為z和b各生產25個零件的時間和為3小時，與題意不符導致錯誤，正確應為3/z+3/b=25=>3z+3b=25bz，以b=z-2/20帶入後計算即可得出z=3/10，因次答案為3/10*40=12
error.teacher_advice_en: The equation you have assumed is incorrect. According to your assumption, z and b represent the time it takes for the respective machines to produce one widget. Since the machines are working together, they can produce 25 widgets in 3 hours. However, the equation you have assumed, z + b = 3/25, implies that the time it takes for z and b to produce 25 widgets each is 3 hours, which is not consistent with the problem statement. This leads to an incorrect result. The correct equation should be 3/z + 3/b = 25, which can be simplified to 3z + 3b = 25bz. Substituting b = z - 2/20 into this equation, we can solve for z and obtain z = 3/10. Therefore, the answer should be 3/10 * 40 = 12.

student_process: assume abhay's speed x km/ hr $\frac{48}{\frac{48}{x}-2} \Rightarrow$ sameer's speed $$ \begin{array}{ll} \frac{48}{\frac{48}{x}-2}-\frac{48}{2 x}=1  \\ \frac{48}{\frac{48}{x}-2}=\left(1+\frac{48}{2x}\right) \\ 48=\frac{48}{x}-2+\frac{48}{2x}\left(\frac{48}{x}-2\right) \\ 48=\frac{48}{x}-2+\frac{48^2}{2 x^2}-\frac{48}{x} \\ 96 x^2=96 x-4 x^2+48^2 -96x \\ 100 x^2 = 2304 \\ x^2 = 34.04 \\  x= \pm \sqrt{23.4} \\ & = \pm 4.8 \\ Ans:4.8 km/hr \end{array} $$

error.teacher_advice_ch: 方程式假設錯誤，等號左右並不相等，同學應該是想將兩者的時間相減等於1來列式，但sameer的時間花費卻直接以他的速度來計算導致錯誤，正確應為48/x-2 -48/(2x)=1
error.teacher_advice_en: The equation is incorrectly set up. The left and right sides of the equation are not equal. The student likely intended to set up an equation where the difference between the two times is equal to 1. However, the time taken by Sameer is calculated directly using his speed, which is incorrect. The correct equation should be: 48/x - 2 - 48/(2x) = 1

error.teacher_advice_ch: 錯誤計算後兩顆球出現的情況，由於每一顆球必須比前一顆球的數字大，因此可以用（10×9×8）的方式挑選三個不同的球。 a、b和c的順序可以如下：-(i)a>b>c。 (ii) a>c>b。 (iii) b>c>a。 （四）b>a>c。 (v)c>a>b。 (六)c>b>a。 它們發生的次數相同。 因此，(a > b > c) 的方式數為： - = > 1 / 6 x 10 x 9 x 8 。 = > 120，正確答案為120/(10*10*10)
error.teacher_advice_en: The teacher's suggestion is to calculate the number of cases where the latter two balls appear incorrectly. Since each ball must be larger than the previous one, (10×9×8) can be used to select three different balls. The order of a, b, and c can be as follows: - (i) a>b>c. (ii) a>c>b. (iii) b>c>a. (iv) b>a>c. (v) c>a>b. (vi) c>b>a. They occur the same number of times. Therefore, the number of ways for (a > b > c) is: - = > 1 / 6 x 10 x 9 x 8. = > 120, the correct answer is 120/(10*10*10)

error.teacher_advice_en: The concept is incorrect. For a train to pass through a platform, the distance it needs to cover is the platform length plus the train length. Therefore, the train's speed is 100 / 10 = 10 m/s, and the train's length is 15 * 10 = 150 m.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 由於披薩離園心越遠面積越大，因此不能直接取直徑的0.75倍作於答案，應計算出0.75倍的面積為多少再返推出半徑，相減後即得出答案，計算方式為8*8*pi*0.75=48*pi，半徑為6.8，餅皮寬度即為8-6.8=1.2
error.teacher_advice_en:
Since the area of the pizza increases as you move away from the center, you cannot simply multiply the diameter by 0.75 to find the answer. Instead, you should calculate the area that is 0.75 times the total area and then find the radius that corresponds to that area. The width of the crust is then the difference between the radius and 8 inches.

The calculation is as follows:

8 * 8 * pi * 0.75 = 48 * pi
Radius = 6.8
Crust width = 8 - 6.8 = 1.2

error.teacher_advice_ch: 題目理解錯誤，大盒的數量正確為比小盒多16，而不是16個大盒
error.teacher_advice_en: The problem is misunderstood. The number of larger boxes is 16 more than the number of smaller boxes, not 16 larger boxes.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 錯誤的計算速度，司機從家到商店的時間就會減少四分之一，當距離固定時，速度的比例為花費時間的反比，因此加速後的速度為原先速度的4/3倍，假設原先的速度為x，建立方程式x+12=4/3*x =>1/3*x=12 => x=36
error.teacher_advice_en: The incorrect calculation of speed would result in a reduction of one-fourth of the time it took the driver to drive from home to the store. When the distance is fixed, the ratio of speeds is inversely proportional to the time spent. Therefore, the speed after acceleration is 4/3 times the original speed. Assuming the original speed is x, we can set up the equation x + 12 = 4/3 * x => 1/3 * x = 12 => x = 36.

student_process: Assume there are $X$ passengers are on board the ship. $$ \begin{aligned} & \left(1-\frac{1}{12}-\frac{1}{8}-\frac{1}{3}-\frac{1}{6}\right) \cdot x=35 \\ & \Rightarrow\left(1-\frac{2}{24}-\frac{3}{24}-\frac{8}{24}-\frac{4}{24}\right) \cdot x=35 \\ & \Rightarrow \frac{7}{24} x=35 \\ & \Rightarrow x=35 \cdot \frac{24}{7}=120 \end{aligned} $$
6 lit $\times 20 \%=1.2$ alcohol assume $x$ lit alcohol is added $$ \begin{aligned} & \frac{1-2+x}{6+x}=50 \% \\ & 3+0.5 x=1.2+x \\ & 0.5 x=1.8 \\ & x=3.6 \text { (litres) } \end{aligned} $$

error.teacher_advice_ch: 題目理解錯誤，腿的總數為頭的總數的兩倍在多8，而不是8倍腿的總數為頭的總數的兩倍
error.teacher_advice_en: The question is misunderstood. The total number of legs is twice the number of heads plus 8, not 8 times the number of heads plus 8.

student_process: Assume the number of blue gumball is $x$, and the total number is $y$. $$ \begin{aligned} & \left(\frac{x}{y}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{x}{y}\right)=\frac{16}{49} \\ & \Rightarrow\left(\frac{x^2}{y^2}\right)=\frac{16}{49} \Rightarrow \frac{x}{y}=\sqrt{\frac{16}{49}}=\frac{4}{\eta} \\ & \Rightarrow\left\{\begin{array}{l} x=4 \\ y=7 \end{array}\right. \end{aligned} $$ $\because \eta-4=3 \Rightarrow$ the number of pink gumball. $\therefore$ the possibility of drawing a pink gumball is $\frac{3}{7}

Assume the length of the journey is $x \mathrm{~km} \&$ the time it take by $60 \mathrm{~km} / \mathrm{hr}$ is $t$. $$ \begin{aligned} & \left\{\begin{array}{l} x \div 60=t-(1) \\ x \div 50=t+\frac{45}{60} \end{array}\right. \\ & \Rightarrow\left\{\begin{array}{l} 5 x=300 t-(3) \\ 6 x=300 t+225 \end{array}\right. \\ & \Rightarrow(4)-(3) \end{aligned} $$

error.teacher_advice_ch: 題目理解錯誤，調製解調器 b 的工作速度是調製解調器 a 的 17%，而不是調製解調器 a 的工作速度是調製解調器 b 的 17%，因此正確計算方法為25.5 / 0.17 = 150
error.teacher_advice_en: The question is misunderstood. Modem b works at 17% of the speed of modem a, not modem a works at 17% of the speed of modem b. So the correct calculation should be 25.5 / 0.17 = 150.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 同學沒有考慮到已計票的反對票數量導致數量錯誤，應先計算出已經開出來的票中反對票的票數，再來計算剩餘7/9的票中反對票的比例
error.teacher_advice_en: The student did not take into account the number of votes already counted against the resolution, which led to an incorrect calculation. The student should first calculate the number of votes against the resolution among the votes already counted, and then calculate the proportion of votes against the resolution among the remaining 7/9 of the votes.

The problem is misunderstood. It takes 4 hours for the man to swim downstream and 4 hours to swim upstream, not 4 hours in total. Therefore, the correct equation is:

28/(x+9) + 16/(x-9) = 4+4 => x=5.5

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_ch: 忘記等比級數公式

error.teacher_advice_ch: 等比數列和的公式為(a1×(1-r^n)/(1-r)，a1表示首項，r表示公比，n表示項數，同學可以套用公式來獲得答案
error.teacher_advice_en: The formula for the sum of a geometric series is (a1×(1-r^n))/(1-r), where a1 is the first term, r is the common ratio, and n is the number of terms. You can use this formula to find the total amount of interest earned at the end of the year.

Assume the distance between shore $a \& b$ is $x$. \& the speed of $\mathrm{m}$ is $y$ yards per hour \& the speed of $b$ is $z$ yards per hour. $t=$ the time past $$ \begin{aligned} & \Rightarrow\left\{\begin{array}{l} y t_1=500 \\ z t_1=(x-500) \\ y t_2=x+300 \\ z t_2=x+(x-300) \end{array}\right. \\ & \Rightarrow\left\{\begin{array}{l} \frac{y t_2}{y t_1}=\frac{t_2}{t_1}=\frac{x+300}{500} \\ \frac{z t_2}{z t_1}=\frac{t_2}{t_1}=\frac{2 x-300}{x-500} \end{array}\right. \\ & \Rightarrow \frac{2 x-300}{x-500}=\frac{x+300}{500} \\ & \Rightarrow 1000 x-150000=x^2-200 x-150000 \\ & \Rightarrow x^2=1200 x \\ & \Rightarrow x=1200  \quad A: 1200 \text { yards } \end{aligned} $$

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_ch: 不會對這麼大的數求餘數
the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. error.teacher_advice_ch: 學生沒有理解真實折扣的意義，真實折扣是未到期時間現值(present value)的單利，因此需先計算出未到期時間的現值2160-360=1800，而360是該值的單利，從而計算出單利的利率(360/1800)後再計算票據面值(face value)未到期時間的單利便可得出banker’s discount
error.teacher_advice_en: The student has not understood the meaning of true discount. True discount is the simple interest on the present value of the bill for the unexpired period. So, first we need to calculate the present value of the bill for the unexpired period, which is 2160 - 360 = 1800. Now, 360 is the simple interest on this value. From this, we can calculate the rate of simple interest (360/1800) and then calculate the simple interest on the face value of the bill for the unexpired period to get the banker's discount.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 方程式假設錯誤，要解出這題，我們可以假設s為火車原速度，t為原花費時間，建立2方程式，(s+4)*(t-1/2)=(s-2)(t+1/3)，化簡可得5s-36t+8=0 -(1)，(s+4)*(t-1/2)=st，化簡可得-s+8t-4=0，乘5得到-5s+40t-20=0 -(2)，(1)+(2)可得4t=12，t=3，帶回(2)得出x=20，因此原距離為3*20=60
error.teacher_advice_en: The equation assumption is wrong. To solve this problem, we can assume s as the original speed of the train, and t as the original time spent. We can establish 2 equations: (s+4)*(t-1/2)=(s-2)(t+1/3), which can be simplified to 5s-36t+8=0 -(1), and (s+4)*(t-1/2)=st, which can be simplified to -s+8t-4=0. Multiplying by 5, we get -5s+40t-20=0 -(2). Adding (1) and (2), we get 4t=12, so t=3. Substituting this back into (2), we get x=20. Therefore, the original distance is 3*20=60.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 可以先列出過這兩點線段的方程式，slope = ( (17+ 2 / 3) - (12+ 2 / 3) ) / ( 7 - 15 ) = (- 5 / 8) y = mx + b = > 12 +2 / 3 = - 15 * 5 / 8 + b = > b = 1，得到線段為 y = - 75 x / 8 + 22，要使x和y皆為整數且x再7<x<15，x只可為8，因此答案為1
error.teacher_advice_en:
First, write the equation of the line segment passing through the two points. The slope is:

$$m = \frac{(17+2/3) - (12+2/3)}{(7 - 15)} = -\frac{5}{8}$$

The equation of the line is:

$$y = mx + b$$

Substituting the slope and one of the points, we get:

$$12 + 2/3 = -15 * 5/8 + b$$

$$b = 1$$

So the equation of the line segment is:

$$y = -\frac{75}{8}x + 22$$

To find the integer points on the line segment, we need to find the values of x that make y an integer. Since x is between 7 and 15, the only integer value of x that makes y an integer is x = 8.

Therefore, there is **1** integer point on the line segment between (15, 12 2/3) and (7, 17 2/3).

To calculate the loss percentage correctly, you need to first calculate the cost price of the radio. The cost price is the original price of the radio before any discounts or markups.

Once you have the cost price, you can then calculate the selling price by subtracting 5% from the cost price.

Finally, you can calculate the loss percentage by dividing the difference between the cost price and the selling price by the cost price and multiplying by 100.

The formula for calculating the loss percentage is:

Loss % = (Cost Price - Selling Price) / Cost Price * 100

In this case, the cost price of the radio is not given, so you cannot calculate the loss percentage.

error.teacher_advice_en:
To calculate the percentage of projected revenue that was actually achieved, you need to divide the actual revenue by the projected revenue and multiply by 100. However, since the projected revenue was 20% higher than last year's revenue, you need to first calculate last year's revenue.

Let's assume last year's revenue was $100. Then, the projected revenue for this year would be $120 (100 + 20% of 100).

However, the actual revenue this year decreased by 35%, which means it was 65% of the projected revenue.

Therefore, the actual revenue was $120 x 65% = $78.

To calculate the percentage of projected revenue that was actually achieved, we divide the actual revenue by the projected revenue and multiply by 100:

($78 / $120) x 100 = 65%

Therefore, the actual revenue was 65% of the projected revenue.

Note that we rounded the answer to the nearest whole number, as requested in the instructions.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 錯誤計算菱形(afce)的長度，the definition of a rhombus states that every side is of equal length . this definition is the key to solving this question . 1 ) we state that the hypotenuse of either side triangle is x . for this solution , i will be working with the left triangle . 2 ) we state that the bottom and top sides of the rhombus are also x , due to the definition of a rhombus . 3 ) we will define the bottom of the left triangle as y . that is , for the rectangle bottom itself , we can define it as 25 = y + x , where x is a side for the rhombus and y is the bottom part of the left triangle . 4 ) from ( 1 ) , we know that x = 202 + y 2 − − − − − − − √ 202 + y 2 . 5 ) from ( 3 ) , we know x = 25 - y . 6 ) from ( 4 ) and ( 5 ) , we have the equation 202 + y 2 − − − − − − − √ = 25 − y 202 + y 2 = 25 − y 7 ) solving for y , we get 4.5 . 8 ) 25 - 4.5 = 20.5 = x 9 ) since all sides of the rhombus are the same , 20.5 * 4 = 41 * 2 = 82 .
error.teacher_advice_en:
The incorrect calculation of the length of the rhombus (afce) is due to the fact that the definition of a rhombus states that every side is of equal length. This definition is the key to solving this question.

1) We state that the hypotenuse of either side triangle is x. For this solution, I will be working with the left triangle.
2) We state that the bottom and top sides of the rhombus are also x, due to the definition of a rhombus.
3) We will define the bottom of the left triangle as y. That is, for the rectangle bottom itself, we can define it as 25 = y + x, where x is a side for the rhombus and y is the bottom part of the left triangle.
4) From (1), we know that x = √(20² + y²).
5) From (3), we know x = 25 - y.
6) From (4) and (5), we have the equation √(20² + y²) = 25 - y
20² + y² = 25 - y
7) Solving for y, we get 4.5.
8) 25 - 4.5 = 20.5 = x
9) Since all sides of the rhombus are the same, 20.5 * 4 = 41 * 2 = 82.

error.teacher_advice_en: The method for calculating true discount is incorrect. The correct formula for true discount is: true discount = (banker's gain * 100) / (p * t), where p is the rate of interest and t is the time period. error.teacher_advice_en:
The incorrect method of calculation has led to an incorrect answer. The correct method is as follows:

Area of triangle is 1 / 2 * 12 * 8 = 48
Side of square = x
The entire triangle split into two right angled triangle and one square with dimensions as follows
i) square with side x
ii) right angled triangle with perpendicular sides x and 12 - x
iii) right angled triangle with perpendicular sides 8 - x and x
Sum of area of all three = 48
= x^2 + 1 / 2 * x * (12 - x) + 1 / 2 * x * (8 - x) = 48
= x = 4.8 cm

error.teacher_advice_en: The question is misunderstood. The question asks "the number of hours it took to produce the deluxe stereos last month was what fraction of the total number of hours it took to produce all the stereos", not "the number of hours it took to produce the deluxe stereos last month was what fraction of the total number of hours it took to produce the basic stereos". Therefore, the number of hours it took to produce the deluxe stereos should be divided by the total number of hours it took to produce all the stereos (1/3*5/7*t+2/3*t).

error.teacher_advice_en: The student correctly calculated the length of the field's side, but made an error in calculating the length of the barbed wire. The correct method is to first calculate the total length of the perimeter wire as 56 * 3 * 4, and then subtract the length of the two gates, 2 * 3 = 6, to get the correct length of 34. Therefore, the average age is 34 / 2 = 17.

Candidate Q will take $t$ hours to complete the job, so we can set up the equation $x * t = 1.5x * (t - 10)$. We also know that $x * t = 360$. We can use these equations to solve for $x$ and find the difference between candidate P's and candidate Q's hourly wages.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 觀念錯誤，n^2能被200整除，要確認能整除 n 的最大正整數是多少，可以先將200質因數分解，得200=2^3*5^2，因此n至少為2^(3/2)*5^(2/2)，因此可以被n整除的最大因數為2*5=10
error.teacher_advice_en: The concept is incorrect. If n^2 is divisible by 200, we need to determine the largest positive integer that divides n. To do this, we can first factorize 200 into its prime factors: 200 = 2^3 * 5^2. Therefore, n must be at least 2^(3/2) * 5^(2/2). Thus, the largest factor that can divide n is 2 * 5 = 10.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 20秒是火車穿過同方向前進的人的速度，18秒是火車穿過反方向前進的人的速度，直接相減不能得出見面時間，可以先火車的速度，第一個人和第二個人分別假設成 t 、 f 和 s，列方程式：20 ( t - f ) = 18 ( t + s )後進行推算
error.teacher_advice_en: 20 seconds is the time taken by the train to cross the person moving in the same direction, and 18 seconds is the time taken by the train to cross the person moving in the opposite direction. Subtracting these two values directly will not give the time they will meet. First, we need to find the speed of the train, the speed of the first person, and the speed of the second person. Let's assume the speed of the train is t, the speed of the first person is f, and the speed of the second person is s. We can set up an equation: 20 ( t - f ) = 18 ( t + s ). We can then solve this equation to find the time they will meet.

error.teacher_advice_en: The concept of calculating the average speed is incorrect. The student's equation assumes that Tom traveled the first 1/4 of the distance at a speed of 24 mph and the remaining 3/4 of the distance at a speed of 45 mph. However, this is not the case in the problem. The average speed should be calculated based on the time taken to travel at each speed, not the distance covered at each speed.

error.teacher_advice_en: The problem is misunderstood. 5.5 hours is the total travel time of the train, not the time taken for the return trip. So, first calculate the time taken for the outward journey and subtract it from the total time to get the time taken for the return trip. Then, you can calculate the speed for the return trip. The correct calculation is: 50 * t = 120 therefore t = 120 / 50 = 2.4 on return speed * ( 5.5 - 2.4 ) = 120 therefore t = 120 / 3.1 = 38.70

error.teacher_advice_en: The teacher's suggestion: There is a mistake in calculating the total number from 101 to 1000. According to the previous calculation, there will be 20 occurrences of 3 between 101 and 199. Therefore, the number of occurrences of 3 in the tens and ones places is 20 * 9 = 180. The remaining occurrences of 3 in the hundreds place need to be considered. Since only 300 to 399 will have 3 in the hundreds place, the number of occurrences in the hundreds place is 399 - 300 + 1 = 100. Therefore, the total number of occurrences is 1 + 19 + 180 + 100 = 300.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Cannot solve for b

error.teacher_advice_ch: 可以換個方式拆解方程式來幫助同學得出答案，假設x=b^2，4 x ^ 2 - 41 x + 100 = 0  =>4 x ^ 2 - 16 x - 25 x + 100 = 0 => ( 4 x - 25 ) ( x - 4 ) =0，由此可得出x的兩個根為25/4和4，因此b的根為5/2和2，兩根之和為2.5+2=4.5
error.teacher_advice_en: Alternatively, you can factor the equation in a different way to help your students find the answer. Let x = b^2, then 4x^2 - 41x + 100 = 0 => 4x^2 - 16x - 25x + 100 = 0 => (4x - 25)(x - 4) = 0. From this, we can find that the two roots of x are 25/4 and 4, so the roots of b are 5/2 and 2. The sum of the two roots is 2.5 + 2 = 4.5.

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_en:
The calculation method is incorrect. The correct process is as follows:

Let the amount of money be 200
Let the cost of 1 orange be 4
Let the cost of 1 mango be 5

He decides to retain 5% of 200 = 10 for taxi fare, so he is left with 190
He buys 20 mangoes so he spends 100
Money left is 90 (190 - 100)
Number of oranges he can buy = 90 / 4 = 22.5

Therefore, George can buy 22 oranges.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Student cannot calculate compound interest

error.teacher_advice_ch: 複利計算時須考慮到前一年利息所產生的利息，公式為 P(1+r/n)^(n*t)其中P 是本金，r 是年利率，n 是每年計息次數，t 是投資或貸款的年限，因此這題的複利利息計算方法為1000*(1+10%)^4-1000
error.teacher_advice_en: When calculating compound interest, you need to consider the interest generated from the interest of the previous year. The formula is P(1+r/n)^(n*t), where P is the principal, r is the annual interest rate, n is the number of times interest is compounded per year, and t is the number of years of investment or loan. Therefore, the compound interest calculation for this question is 1000*(1+10%)^4-1000.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 由於雙方的總薪資皆為300，因此可以假設q的時薪為x，p的薪資為1.5x，q花費時間t來完成工作，建立方程式x * t = 1.5 x * ( t - 10 )且x*t=300，可以得出t=30，因此q ' s hourly wage is 300 / 30 = $ 10 p ' s hourly wage is 300 / ( t - 10 ) = $ 15 which is $ 5 per hour more
error.teacher_advice_en:
Since the total pay for both candidates is $300, we can assume that candidate Q's hourly wage is $x, and candidate P's hourly wage is $1.5x. Let's say candidate Q takes t hours to complete the job. We can set up the equation:

x * t = 1.5x * (t - 10)

We also know that x * t = 300.

Solving for t, we get t = 30.

Therefore, candidate Q's hourly wage is $300 / 30 = $10.

Candidate P's hourly wage is $300 / (t - 10) = $15, which is $5 per hour more.

Therefore, the correct calculation should be:  Let the amounts be x, y,   z in ascending order of value. As the interest rate and interest accrued are the same for 2 years, 6 years, and 11 years, i.e., 2x=6y=11z, where k.l.c.m. of 2,6,11=66, so x:y:z=33000:11000:6000  The amount deposited for 11 years is 6000.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 解題觀念錯誤， 42 公里/小時的速度行駛的火車在 9 秒內超越了同向騎行的人。如果騎自行車的人朝相反方向行駛，火車將在5秒內從他身邊經過，並不代表火車長度為火車7秒鐘行駛的距離，正確計算方法應為：let the length of the train be x meter and the speed of the cyclist is y m / s now when the train and the cyclist are in the same direction , the relative speed is : ( 35 / 3 - y ) m / s [ converting 42 km / h to m / s - 35 / 3 m / s ] now distance / relative speed = 9 seconds substituting the values , we get x + 9 y. . . ( 1 ) similarly calculate the relative speed when they are in the opposite direction the relative speed is ( 35 / 3 + y ) now distance / relative speed is equivalent to 5 seconds substituting the values , we get the equation 3 x - 15 y = 175 . . . ( 2 ) solving ( 1 ) and ( 2 ) , we get x = 75 meters
error.teacher_advice_en: There's a misconception in solving this problem. Just because a train traveling at 42 km/h overtakes a cyclist going in the same direction in 9 seconds and would pass a cyclist going in the opposite direction in 5 seconds, it doesn't mean the train's length equals the distance it travels in 7 seconds. The correct method to calculate this involves setting up the following equations: Let the length of the train be x meters, and the speed of the cyclist be y m/s. When the train and the cyclist are moving in the same direction, the relative speed is (35/3 - y) m/s [converting 42 km/h to m/s gives 35/3 m/s]. Using distance divided by relative speed equals time, for 9 seconds, substituting these values gives x + 9y = 105... (1). Similarly, calculate the relative speed when they are in opposite directions. The relative speed then is (35/3 + y). Now using distance divided by relative speed equals time for 5 seconds, substituting these values gives 3x - 15y = 175... (2). Solving equations (1) and (2), we find x = 75 meters.

error.teacher_advice_en: The equation is incorrect. The left side of the equation is 3, while the right side is multiplied by 4, resulting in an unequal equation. To correct this, first convert c to a: 6a = 3a + 3c => c = a. Then substitute the value of c into 6a = 4b + 4c => 6a = 4b + 4a => a = 2b. Therefore, a's speed is twice that of b, and b will take 12 days to complete the work alone.

The formula that can be used for this problem is (a+b+c)^2 = a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + 2ab +2ac + abc. Therefore, the square root of 138+2*131 will give the answer.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 沒有考慮到各個情形出現機率不同導致錯誤，當骰子數為1,2,3,4,5,6時，3^s的值分別為9,81,6261,729,9,81，因此9和81出現的機率2/6為其他值的機率為1/6，將同學所找出的解計算出發生的機率後計算機率總合即可得出答案，解1的機率為2/6*2/6=4/36，解2的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解3的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解4的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解5的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解6的機率為1/6*1/6=1/36，總和(1/36)*1+(2/36)*4+(4/36)=13/36即為正確答案
error.teacher_advice_en: The solution does not take into account the different probabilities of each case, leading to an incorrect answer. When the dice number is 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, the values of 3^s are 9, 81, 6261, 729, 9, 81, respectively. Therefore, the probability of 9 and 81 appearing is 2/6, while the probability of other values is 1/6. By calculating the probability of each solution found by the student and summing the probabilities, the correct answer can be obtained. The probability of solution 1 is 2/6 * 2/6 = 4/36, the probability of solution 2 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, the probability of solution 3 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, the probability of solution 4 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, the probability of solution 5 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, and the probability of solution 6 is 1/6 * 1/6 = 1/36. The sum (1/36) * 1 + (2/36) * 4 + (4/36) = 13/36 is the correct answer.

student_process: $x$ is man's work per day $y$ is woman's work per day $$ \begin{aligned} & (6 x+8 y) \times 10=(26 x+48 y) \times 2 \\ & x=2 y \\ & (6 x+8 y) \times 10=200 y \\ & 15 x+20 y=50 y \\ & 200 y \div 50 y=4 \text { day } \end{aligned} $$
Assume take $x$ hours $$ \begin{aligned} & (40+40) x=100 \\ & \Rightarrow 80 x=100 \\ & \Rightarrow x=\frac{100}{80}=\frac{5}{4}=1,25  \end{aligned} $$
if everyone need one unit food per day then the current total amount of food is $40 \times 20=800$ unit 3 $$ \frac{800}{(40+10)}=16(d a y s) $$

Assume the cost is $X$. $$ \begin{aligned} & \frac{670-x}{x}=-10 \% \\ & \Rightarrow 630-x=(-0.1 x) \\ & \Rightarrow 630=0.9 x \\ & \Rightarrow x=700 \\ & \eta 00 \times(1+10 \%) \\ & =700 \times 1.1 \\ & =770  \end{aligned} $$
assume the price online $X$ $$ \begin{aligned} & \frac{x-(16+0.2 x)}{16}=20 \% \\ & 0.8 x-16=3.2 \\ & 0.8 x=19.2 \\ & x=24 \text { (dollars) } \end{aligned} $$

assume the degree of the smaller angle is $\chi^0$, then the bigger one is $y^{\circ}$ $$ \begin{aligned} & \left\{\begin{array}{l} x+y=180 \\ -x+y=20 \end{array}\right. \\ & 2 y=200 \\ & y=100 \\ & x=80^{\circ} \end{aligned} $$
